Name: black_lightning_mod
Desc:
The Black Lightning mod is the ultimate overpowered cultivation experience.

This mod adds:
- OP Cultivation Laws with insane multipliers (Black Lightning Dao + Sect Sovereign Dao)
- OP Pills that max out stats and guarantee breakthroughs
- OP Items & Artifacts with game-breaking power (Heaven-Rending Sword, Sect-Destroyer Talisman, Forbidden Seal, Void Talisman)
- OP Reincarnators with maxed traits and bonuses (4 new godlike reincarnators added)
- 3 new OP traits: Sect Slayer, Primordial God Body, Heaven's Nemesis
- New Law: Sect Sovereign Dao — one cultivator can solo an entire sect

This mod is designed to be absolutely broken. Enjoy the power of the heavens.
Author: mdcslayer
IncreasedDesc:
1.0.0
- Initial release
- Added OP laws, pills, items, and reincarnators
1.0.1
- The legacy artifact will now properly reduce the spell-casting delay, instead of increasing it.
1.0.2
- Fixed added manuals drop rate
- Updated the law adventure
- Updated the secret adventure
- Fixed typos
1.0.3
- Fixed required game version so that it should be compatible with gamepass
- Fixed more typos
1.1.0
- Added new traits
- Added new reincarnators
1.2.0
- Added 3 new god-tier traits: Sect Slayer, Primordial God Body, Heaven's Nemesis
- Added 2 new OP backstories: Supreme Sovereign Reincarnation, Heaven-Defying Paragon
- Added 4 new max-stat OP reincarnators: Long Tian, Xiao Yan, Chu Feng, Ye Zichen
- Added 2 new game-breaking artifacts: Heaven-Rending Sword, Sect-Destroyer Talisman
- Added new Sect Sovereign Dao law with full skill tree (can solo entire sects)
- Added Ancient Sovereign's Ruins discovery adventure for new law
